nasb.text: I will gather those who grieve about the appointed feasts— They came from you, O Zion; The reproach of exile is a burden on them.

esv.text: I will gather those of you who mourn for the festival, so that you will no longer suffer reproach.

cnv.text: “那些屬你，為了切慕大會而憂愁的人， 他們擔當了羞辱； 我必招聚他們。

ccb.text: “我必招聚你那里因不能守节期而忧愁的人， 使你不再蒙受羞辱。
